title: astragalus neoverticillatus
intro: Astragalus neoverticillatus, also known as the Chinese milk vetch or Astragalus, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus neoverticillatus include boosting the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus neoverticillatus can be prepared as an herbal supplement in capsule or tablet form, or as a tea, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
